message:
chore(setup): add ubs:ignore annotations on guarded unwrap() calls

The .find().unwrap() calls in unpatch_shell_rc_at() and
patch/unpatch_wezterm_config_block_at() are preceded by
.contains() guards, so they cannot panic. Add ubs:ignore
annotations to suppress false-positive warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
